name: convex
description: Expert guidance for Convex backend development including queries, mutations, actions, schemas, authentication, scheduling, file storage, search, and Next.js integration. Use when working with Convex functions, database operations, convex/ directory code, or Next.js App Router with Convex. Triggers: convex functions, ctx.db, useQuery, useMutation, usePreloadedQuery, preloadQuery, fetchQuery, convex schema, convex auth, convex cron, convex actions, convex scheduling, ctx.storage, generateUpload...
